Total Payable within due date {{totalPayable}}
Late Fee Fine after due date Rs. 150 Per Day

Instructions:

  1. Dues once paid are non refundable non transferable.
  2. Rs. 100/- will be charged in case of Re-Issuance of Challan.
  3. Scholarship/Concession will be cancelled if a student dont maintain minimum 70% Attendance and 80% academic record.
  4. Fines will be calculated as per policy.
  5. Rs. 150/- per day late fee will be charged on the challan after due date.
